Thank you for the suggestion. Please describe the feature and why it matters.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] I described the problem this feature solves.
- [ ] I included a proposed API or behavior.

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want and how it should work.

## Use Case

Why this feature is useful, and who benefits from it.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative solutions or workarounds you considered.

## Proposed API

```python
# How you'd expect to use this feature
```

## Acceptance Criteria (Optional)

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

Add context, references, related issues, or links here.
